Originally founded as 'Nangong Laiyun Automotive Supplies' in Nangong City, Hebei Province (known historically for its fur and felt processing industry), the company has relocated its operations to Xuyi County in Huaian, Jiangsu. Despite being categorized broadly under 'Automotive parts manufacturing', its specific business scope—processing and sales of 'automotive supplies and fur products'—reveals its true nature: a specialized manufacturer of car interior accessories, particularly sheepskin or faux-fur car seat covers and steering wheel covers.
